# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_backup_policies (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances backup policies of the tenant.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all backup policies of the tenant.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_backup_policies" "all" {}

output "policies" {
  value = [
    for p in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_backup_policies.all.backup_policies :
    "${p.name} (${coalesce(p.retention, 0)} restore points)"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `backup_policies` (List of Object) The list of backup policies. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backup_policies))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--backup_policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backup_policies`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `retention` (Number)
- `schedule_cron` (String)
- `schedule_window_duration_minutes` (Number)
- `schedule_window_start_hour` (Number)
